calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. GEORGE APOSHIAN, Esq. of Law Offices of Kenneth J. Freed (tel:818-990-0888) for Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, INC.
Atty. NILS ROSENQUEST, Esq. of Rosenquest & Associates (tel: 415-292-0980) for Defendant Addy Wong.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ADDY WONG's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying Defendant's motion to set aside default and default judgment (see signed order for complete ruling). (302/RBU)*****

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JAKOB WEITZ, Esq. of Law Offices of Kenneth J. Freed (tel: 818-990-0888) for Plaintiff.
Atty. NILS ROSENQUEST, Esq. of Rosenquest & Associates (tel: 415-292-0980) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ADDY WONG's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

Matter discussed. Counsel Weitz is to provide the Court with courtesy copies no later than March 12, 2024. The Court continues the matter to March 27, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
